_disclaimer: DEMO CONTENT — synthetic data for local development and demos only. Not derived from real assessments.
title: AMPEL Branch Protection Policy
content:
title: AMPEL Branch Protection Policy
metadata:
  type: Policy
  id: ampel-branch-protection
  version: 1.0.0
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  description: >-
    Automated evaluation policy for branch protection controls.
    Assesses GitHub repositories for compliance with branch protection
    best practices using AMPEL.
  author:
    id: complytime
    name: ComplyTime
    type: Software Assisted
  mapping-references:
    - id: repo-branch-protection
      title: Branch Protection Controls
      version: 1.0.0
      description: Control catalog for branch protection rules

contacts:
  responsible:
    - name: Repository Administrator
  accountable:
    - name: Security Team

scope:
  in:
    technologies:
      - GitHub
    users:
      - Repository maintainers

criteria:
  - id: BP-1
    title: Require Pull Request Reviews
    description: Ensure changes to protected branches go through a pull request process.
    catalog-ref: repo-branch-protection/BP-1
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: BP-1.01
        description: Direct pushes to protected branches MUST be blocked.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: BP-2
    title: Require Minimum Approvals
    description: Pull requests to protected branches must have a minimum number of approvals.
    catalog-ref: repo-branch-protection/BP-2
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: BP-2.01
        description: Pull requests must require a minimum number of approvals.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: BP-3
    title: Restrict Force Pushes
    description: Force pushes to protected branches must be blocked.
    catalog-ref: repo-branch-protection/BP-3
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: BP-3.01
        description: Force pushes to protected branches must be blocked.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: BP-4
    title: Prevent Admin Bypass
    description: Admin bypass of branch protection rules must be prevented.
    catalog-ref: repo-branch-protection/BP-4
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: BP-4.01
        description: Admin bypass prevention must be enabled on protected branches.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: BP-5
    title: Require Code Owner Review
    description: Code owner review must be required when CODEOWNERS file exists.
    catalog-ref: repo-branch-protection/BP-5
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: BP-5.01
        description: Code owner review requirements must be enabled.
        frequency: on-demand

adherence:
  evaluation-methods:
    - type: Gate
      description: AMPEL automated branch protection evaluation
      executor:
        id: ampel
        name: AMPEL
        type: Software
  assessment-plans:
    - id: BP-1.01
      requirement-id: BP-1.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: ampel
    - id: BP-2.01
      requirement-id: BP-2.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: ampel
    - id: BP-3.01
      requirement-id: BP-3.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: ampel
    - id: BP-4.01
      requirement-id: BP-4.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: ampel
    - id: BP-5.01
      requirement-id: BP-5.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: Gate
          executor:
            id: ampel
